data.title: Echo360 awards 2026 e3 Tech Grants to 15 institutions in Asia-Pacific, totaling over $65,000 USD.
data.description: In New York on March 4, 2026, Echo360, a renowned global leader in innovative learning and AI-driven education technology through the EchosystemTM, revealed the 2026 beneficiaries in the Asia-Pacific region (APAC) for its e3 Tech Grants initiative. A total of over $65,000 USD was granted to recipients in the APAC market.

data.title: Shipley Donuts celebrates St. Patrick's Day with Lucky Dozen donuts available for 2 weeks in Houston.
data.description: For a limited time, Shipley Donuts in Houston is offering a new variety of St. Patrick's Day donuts called the Lucky Dozen. These festive treats will be available for 2 weeks only, while supplies last. Shipley Donuts is known as the largest brand of fresh, handmade daily donuts and kolaches in the nation. Customers can enjoy a little green in their treats to celebrate the season. Don't miss out on trying these limited-time donuts!

data.title: Enrollment now open for K12-powered virtual public schools in Colorado; families can enroll in online school with state-certified teachers.
data.description: Families in Colorado have the opportunity to enroll in an online public school that is overseen by teachers certified by the state. This initiative allows families to access quality education through virtual means. The program is specifically designed to cater to the educational needs of students across the state. This online platform enables students to learn from state-certified teachers and engage in a comprehensive curriculum that meets educational standards. Families interested in this program can enroll their students for a seamless online learning experience.

data.title: Morgan Stanley selects Coinbase and BNY Mellon as custodians for upcoming Bitcoin ETF, demonstrating a major step in embracing crypto.
data.description: Among recent developments, Morgan Stanley has disclosed the custodians for its Bitcoin ETF, a significant move as the Wall Street titan inches towards complete adoption of cryptocurrencies. This revelation marks a pivotal step for Morgan Stanley in the crypto arena. The disclosure of the ETF custodians by the financial powerhouse signifies a notable progression, reflecting the growing significance of digital assets in mainstream finance. This event underscores the increasing acceptance and integration of Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies within the institutional investment landscape, paving the way for more substantial involvement from traditional financial entities. This move not only signifies a strategic shift in approach but also underscores the evolving attitude towards digital currencies within the conventional financial sector, reflecting the changing tide towards greater acceptance and utilization of cryptocurrencies.

data.title: CPS closes $50 million securitization of residual interests from prior securitizations.
data.description: In Las Vegas, Nevada, on March 04, 2026, Consumer Portfolio Services, Inc. (Nasdaq: CPSS) disclosed the completion of a securitization. The company, known as CPS, finalized a $50.0 million deal involving residual interests from past securitizations.

data.title: Abercrombie & Fitch faces $40 million tariff impact in 2026 despite profit beat. Q4 sales: $1.669 billion, net sales up 5% to $2024 with 1% comp sales growth. CEO pleased with record growth.
data.description: Abercrombie & Fitch Co. (NYSE: ANF) saw a drop in shares despite exceeding profit expectations, as concerns over margins and a less optimistic future outlook impacted investor confidence. In the latest quarterly report, the company posted adjusted earnings per share of $3.68 for the fourth quarter, surpassing the analyst consensus of $3.57. Quarterly sales totaled $1.669 billion, in line with analyst projections. Net sales for the fourth quarter experienced a 5% uptick to $2.024 billion, showing steady growth across regions, brands, and channels, with comparable sales up by 1%. Fran Horowitz, the Chief Executive Officer, noted that the record net sales for the quarter marked the company's thirteenth consecutive quarter of growth, with both operating margin and earnings per share performing well and meeting expectations.

data.title: Ademi LLP investigates Farmer Brothers Coffee Co. for fair pricing, possible fiduciary duty breaches in transaction with Royal Cup Coffee and Tea.
data.description: Milwaukee, as of March 4, 2026 - Ademi LLP is currently conducting an investigation into Farmer Brothers (NASDAQ: FARM) regarding potential breaches of fiduciary duty and other legal violations related to its recent partnership with Royal Cup Coffee and Tea. For details on participating in the investigation, please visit the provided link.

data.title: Elizabeth G. Matzkin, MD, FAAOS named AAOS Second Vice President after 2026 Annual Meeting.
data.description: In March 4, 2026, Dr. Elizabeth G. Matzkin, an orthopedic surgeon from Boston, was appointed as the second vice president of the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons (AAOS) after the AAOS 2026 Annual Meeting held in New Orleans. This appointment marks the beginning of her four-year volunteer term in this position.
